### KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology: Quick Overview
* **Programs Offered**: B.E, B.Tech, M.E, MBA, Ph.D

KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology (KPRIET) was established by the KPR Group in Coimbatore with the goal of offering high-quality engineering education in a tech-driven environment. It is affiliated to Anna University and approved by AICTE. While the final placement report for the KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is yet to be published, placements are currently underway. According to preliminary data from the institute, 445 students have already been placed, securing a total of 650 job offers. The highest domestic package offered to a KPRIET student was INR 54 LPA, with 462 students receiving offers exceeding INR 4 LPA. The first phase of placements at KPRIET achieved an impressive placement rate of 73.7%.
